properties.toiletnote: Separated from The River Room Café building, follow the white footpath on west side of cafe.

properties.name: Woolworths Sherwood
properties.addressnote: Located in the basement car park.

properties.name: Construction Training Centre
properties.addressnote: The public toilet is located to the east of the public EV fast Charging units. Follow signs to the EV Chargers and you will see the public toilet (Building 12) located in the car park.
properties.toiletnote: The person with disability (PWD) toilet is incontinence friendly with a dedicated disposal bin.

properties.name: Queensland Art Gallery
properties.address1: Queensland Art Gallery | Gallery of Modern Art

properties.name: Highpoint
properties.accessnote: Ask shops/offices for access card.

properties.name: Monier Village
properties.addressnote: Entrance is next to Woolworths.

properties.name: Montague Markets
properties.addressnote: Located near Woolworths - adjacent to the travelator and lift on the right hand side.

properties.name: West Village Shopping Precinct
properties.addressnote: Ground Floor on left side of travelator
properties.accessnote: Parking located in the basement.

properties.name: Musgrave Park Swimming Pool
properties.addressnote: Located adjacent to the pool registers.
properties.toiletnote: Female toilets located upstairs no lift provided

properties.name: West End Library
properties.addressnote: Located behind the counter.
properties.openinghours: OPEN: Thu 10am-7pm, Wed,Fri 10am-5pm, Tue 1pm-5pm, Sat 9am-4pm, Mon 9am-1pm
properties.openinghoursnote: Closed on Sundays.

properties.name: BNE Service Centre
properties.addressnote: Located at Food Court

properties.name: The Soda Factory - Coles West End
properties.addressnote: Located in Basement 1 entrance/

properties.name: 175 Eagle Street
properties.toiletnote: The toilet is located upstairs from Riverside or downstairs from Eagle Street on walkway between the river and Eagle Street.

properties.name: Biami Yumba Playground
properties.openinghoursnote: Opening hours should be open 24 hours.

properties.name: Nudgee Railway Station
properties.openinghoursnote: Open when station is manned.

properties.name: Suncorp Stadium
properties.addressnote: Caxton Street, Milton
properties.parkingnote: Parking on non-event days only in area off Caxton Street.
properties.adultchangenote: Located beside stadium entry at northern end and on Level 5 at the southern end. Users must provide their own sling. Contact stadium security on non-event days in case of an emergency.
properties.openinghoursnote: Access is internally to both facilities only during events and externally from Caxton St end on non-event days. MLAK is required for all access. Changing Places is unavailable via the external door from midnight before an event to midnight after an event.

properties.name: The Gabba
properties.addressnote: Gate 9 is the closest gate to the Changing Places facility.
properties.adultchangenote: Open during Gabba events for ticket holders only. Located on Level 2 near Gate 9.
properties.openinghoursnote: Open during Gabba events only.

properties.name: Brisbane Entertainment Centre
properties.parkingnote: Free parking available outside of events.
properties.adultchangenote: Located on ground level to the left of the main entry staircase.
properties.openinghoursnote: Contact Security on 07 3265 8280 for assistance accessing the Changing Places facility outside of events.

properties.name: Aldi Shops
properties.toiletnote: Down alley way between shops. Easy access. Disability parking nearby

properties.name: South Point Southbank
properties.accessnote: BYO MLAK or speak to security
properties.babychangenote: Baby change table is in the disabled bathroom

properties.name: Inala Plaza
properties.addressnote: Just inside from the bus station

properties.name: Roma Street Parkland Amphitheatre
properties.addressnote: Located adjacent to the Amphitheatre.

properties.name: Paddington Central
properties.addressnote: Latrobe Terrace Level (Level 4), beside Sullivan Nicolaides Pathology.
